since_last: 52% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.84%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC -0.07% · Gold +0.58% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 52% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.84%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.84%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.14%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +8.90%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +8.90%, OKLO +5.10%, OKLO +5.10%, NOW +4.85%, CRM +3.57%. Laggards: MU -2.83%, CRNC -2.39%, LRCX -2.34%, MRVL -2.21%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.56% at $171.82
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.56% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
